Courageous Conservatives - Reigniting the Promise of America
**Hello Friend,**
This week we followed up on a very successful [Rally for Religious Liberty](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLyx-2FfYGqyCM1A1cRZnLoHNvDkyf5meL5CiS2aFtdMPIzpOtv7UCs6cJZNtp9vIpGYPQ-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCGqVOw1fmCM42S2dIdhhZru5saLy1Rvyc-2B0GZCTOhVCWGn9QfovvfyuiJ7VdyvExXubbddjQxGaAU-2Fm-2F4nOtcpQHib1UpWpPhqWYwjwog-2Bb3V0GUyiQrKOXp96v3DjGpLBnvMfq-2FeE1AVJAYkG2NaY64GHcxvmY5z-2FLwnIqBSxdE-2BalCgSyNKU6QcmyBOe-2Fqq-2B02Lk4EKcqhdkzC44V0XQtjIj-2B0H6Qr-2FixanCGbTf-2FLvqf0uM5H5ES16uNKgy48qZYf-2BjDAhpBSC4a7BzO8iy8y8L-2Bv1EBNLUYI9-2F4-2BKElEPwbWZKOcRVML7Msy-2BUOBJdo5f-2F96HyCSV74tGBGJk-2BTdotV96CClK65UHvJ9feFMfoFGJaJy90fZBekCHdWex8-3D) in Des Moines, Iowa, and an amazing seven-state bus tour through the south by continuing to build out our robust leadership teams across the nation.
The Cruz for President Campaign had previously announced our Statewide Leadership Team in Iowa, and this week we were proud to roll out our [first round of County Chairs in the Hawkeye state](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6SnjwrvgKAvUhsKcIdgYThCEaXrPmgFlYt6v22Rt0t-2BW57hJs4-2F2lNSIw7-2FG6UVmh1EnmiYrJsdSNl4oXMv-2FBeWJ-2BW_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCGqVOw1fmCM42S2dIdhhZrukan-2BK9Vkq7FrUqP-2F5MLzDaocwaMWIqL6TSTUdMJv8wI6KVJ8fulX-2FPN-2FDAhB8132swFY-2BPN-2F-2FOHsRUQf-2B5qU3FZIMg6Uutu3nGuqJP3mGjH5Fbf8OaWilq4wVfyKDe-2FbdKIfRA0Px-2BtfzC84-2FcYsQNh3tU3NIqtp2A99A5g6zpTFTU0Fk1uCQm-2FNwEoIl17ZHs7quSdCmEKMi566FX7a1cI9o-2FrkLz9d4pRyewOAx0cHMJa7-2FcGYOBIpaYLYCT9Sp1tjAJlw2hd1TW7Qk1xE0O02mi0Gk90J8-2BvjDn8PpNv14bYHMNghz2-2BKj8Ke-2F1TdauYx2nDKiRevQxthz1jkrl5jYr5cQ-2FpOXkVYE8pjHkE-3D) giving a look at the county level organization being built by the Cruz campaign in Iowa.
Ted put it best by saying, "Our Iowa team continues to demonstrate the strength and diversity of support we are seeing in Iowa and across the country. I'm encouraged by the fact that our team is made up of both seasoned veterans and energetic newcomers to the political process and excited to see our grassroots team building strength in all of the early states, and our Iowa team continues to lead the way as the Leadership Team and County Chairs are organizing the state right down to the precinct level."
In addition to adding to our team in Iowa, we also announced a second round of members to our New Hampshire Leadership Team in advance of Ted's return to the Granite State [this weekend](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6SnjzGP0E8g5KWToJg1WwWZ2aq_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCGqVOw1fmCM42S2dIdhhZru7NzosfHAfaPhHyluYmpHPZicoXmfcAyDZOEbhO6O4M1RtJrwf-2ByuKAj7qTgh9ekp1gIhQcW83YkMziMlhiKP1l80F-2BwnGpXfXRyobEXyh1YvMr-2Fr6iB8P-2BTKce1Vfy2ou-2FwI0VJs1jNkZ5tDRk6-2Fjg3A6uXQN1OSMGFpWkRUGgyZ47-2FoIkQIQVHDto00eNxa15KsT-2Bhb9MTUbICsqlKWInmMKPhEp0i2ANlyjmhdc85PdteXSEqtqrY2BXFIDhww9bh7UTWnMCqIzvRLJ0ZwJrEyOImLgfP7vgShNwXIrbknqTvm7PFgJf-2F61XpWfWMxSNkvPk-2FHD2fUHizCdi19nAkr0tqLGdkc44H3cf-2Fu-2BH8-3D). [This group of sixty-six courageous conservatives](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6SnjywjP6VUh0OLaPqlEmU7RXst0kKI-2FPvVqHxv65dvAF9b-2Bxk-2FcGXpzgnlVtRyZwTxXpssFydkNoKGl6Dc7eIsb3dTDg6MRzEF9siYBdlyhqD6w-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCGqVOw1fmCM42S2dIdhhZrudC13n44Wf8dchp4iZ3DREDGTrc59Gllm-2BwY-2F8AvZ0mIl5mYw9mPCz6PZ28ouD-2FSBkhP84AXfrvTUlidmnlcOdC8ECseWdzwqM7MqCHj-2BMs3jPJxX5GAIl0kJI7Y5z3qGE6DC9ImVCYm8aLx3pf8a5nnXb-2FiUjlPVf-2BYyV9XQuxRPVwKg43HDSRcBvVA-2F6OucFgixki0ntEfp85v0yeBu96bsfUcja7SdAsaZ2fEIZbMtHACT-2FcnWRqTn5qO97kzPgJb4T93TWvGG8snSTkVVeUBEET3gm1YYnO-2Fnw8L0f2FlbbjvJGrV-2BAnvdiYm8ui6ZQpkyrVPW-2BIaJ08mn44fXHIuQltxh5cuOfEF8BqI8OA-3D) joins forty-one other leaders who endorsed Cruz earlier in the spring, including New Hampshire co-chairs, former Speaker Bill O'Brien, former Sen. Bob Smith, and Executive Councilor David Wheeler.
Now totaling 107, the Cruz for President New Hampshire Leadership Team consists of conservative activists, former and current elected officials, and liberty and faith based leaders across all ten counties in the Granite State.
We were also especially excited to [announce our "Vets for Ted" military coalition this week](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6SnjyUBZliOzo8lV9E8lHqUEETCAT8TwPyxiPDL3tDdDyrQ43EzBwBdP2wWpBToC-2BvH-2FBmgUgPR4cD6eWhm9NyhJHk3Q8EMrzpJQgyGSzPEiI6yobEzq709DKYpwQMA05fO3PVSn4HRSls1DjT1m5Sd3A91AnQOeQonsoAbOZ2ep4wYAg5ls0UOp-2BeApa51lwxEaVfQuIHpS8Mrvy7roGNatpiaeCaMPxqVgXkBQ9cesqmjw-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCGqVOw1fmCM42S2dIdhhZruw0NQ-2BcXNZJgFPs1HLrlbbGHC32hc0G6a65RLR3tPcHzWu3n1ie0BOQ9LLXyDS9igXBKjRygRPqRmmMtB2O-2BJD1NzTT9dpxQlhl7phimPixUbMzG4xGa-2FVLl777w8yvVKjxg1i5TSTMY1hvb7ak9EbGnIVJjOLZrI5iF1zIO0EWN2xwBgNz5XPxIiG6gtBEe97W1NAFDaQEK1QxOdVnBklAo0y4v-2FIVznNGyQDJfGFqMeRB2pptB2UNvlJEv5C9JXmNzTjM13CcAF-2F4uvpS0CkaxkgSEEIPbiU2yqt1VbsyL4XYdLfFS4D4V5W7kNggYUl5HvzTNiE5pTn5m9pjZK8GBIJ2NIjgqxjhp8ZexX5VU-3D). Former U.S. Sen. Bob Smith of New Hampshire, Congressman Jim Bridenstine of Oklahoma, and Texas State Sen. Brian Birdwell will serve as co-chairs, and Bill Connor will serve as national director. It's truly an honor to have the support of such a terrific group of patriots for this campaign. If you'd like to join our "Vets for Ted" military coalition, [**please click here**](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=MLnKobwPs6Slkiu7xHTnlZU0U6re2yHcn2faHAs5Nl8-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCGqVOw1fmCM42S2dIdhhZrujCNkkaIiWCplTAN6PWJA2Ye4QJVvRd5BtgOzIJ2WvKnJQtAIg7tpeXb7Z8q6uiWuMy0c852ZFQuxVUaneJjmLZJ-2FWGPAWVIPqAizo27n5JuX1DR4joG4ivkU1TWXPYOmcnL9XiChVNVcW9WxTLMdmXtsxLjfuC-2FjewNIL8yvLud654UWbHGSAuSBbkB5OZmTuUk02D7Oq3Kki3uVIYVBoMa3A-2FXO64tMMu3eK-2B9rsGm7JzUDj-2F-2BcgHlgWhvZa9PYbHsgbKL4-2B1U8rMKvPBTjiTigv77n9lxOwu65vrDqvm8aH9g9PZRkZOGSJ4-2BTugDKHcet7vNPUmnIAyH5rXEjVYHE7Q4T81ddsnpGDGOQOrg-3D).
We also had Ron Robinson, CEO of Young America's Foundation (YAF), [endorse our campaign](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6SnjwcZS2vbxrxzwmIL0MciqlDALVb7V5-2B2RCA-2FPZehNrlJVCd9guDwlNZNWKXB-2BxKq-2Bo-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCGqVOw1fmCM42S2dIdhhZruVK9VRG3U-2F1baNTrrZbj4YLr4fwC6qoQbfmO8WakbVk6N-2FKGgg38Tg6sfkoc3T-2Bwn42wp-2BfWNarlspysg6jW84XyB7pe7KunE6esZhWfyardTwl4HDnVJNrA5ds-2Fry28eg8Kfarbt3mHN9jGX20sAafpJ47ETPbktwQgUmLRZAcQKRPHp-2FDezVW-2BIkH73yXTBqepAp-2FBX-2FclmrxwDXFVmGtqTjVEG9hIIt6YKLYtiHNmByNnifOspBbCOqetYBcMPfmUvjq7n-2BjXjOX8M2f4lfgXdP3AamTeKjx6IRqVYBaa8xQKKpJmUHWL-2BaU-2BpqRT6zl6R6F48IsADcNNSwhdGjx2nEFtSGVADISz4ecdJdPs-3D) this week. Robinson was one of the founders of the Conservative Political Action Conference (CPAC) and Citizens United, and has served as CEO of YAF for over thirty years. And I think you'll agree with me that he captured what this campaign is all about in his endorsement [statement](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6SnjwcZS2vbxrxzwmIL0MciqlDALVb7V5-2B2RCA-2FPZehNrlJVCd9guDwlNZNWKXB-2BxKq-2Bo-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCGqVOw1fmCM42S2dIdhhZruCuk5RmHTMaNVkKpOYudkYb4JrIpvdMsjzFfBkbJOjp5L7RL63OHrZqDumHT-2F7jRbEiwMmrCTjCY8MI90qFkEs-2BNp6YqrQZgmWGxmVQKxSwFdLdq9USRCmIRoOKu5958I57m4QxsWMPWouB3oj44xj0575W-2FOyqOaIBGcAVPKjRnnoW-2BQhkQkiyv3-2F-2FecRwvHrUDHgcko4Cd0KHa4ok7BFacxZq74JxeDUBQzNXMIWlzN9Vkv3MoyeFacY-2Bfj06jCRXbx8TF6GEH0nSQclsFvGSzxQIGb6tt-2FpYVmzqySAFamom1b39Fo-2BT8dCVB8SypGLXM1KUQDaolZ3k3lcZPZBnjGxCdZAf7PLNyvUDZRfKQ-3D):
_Americans are disappointed with their government - and not just with the current president. In the last twenty-five years, we've had presidents who promised not to raise our taxes, but who did. We've had Supreme Court justices who pledged to fulfill the Founders' vision of limited government and judicial restraint, but who did not. We've had leaders in the House and Senate who boldly promised a consistent and robust opposition to the Democrats' agenda, but once in office provided nothing of the sort._
**_Who we need for America 's next president is someone we conservatives can be certain will abide by his principles and promises. That man is Ted Cruz._**
_..._
_No candidate can better restore hope and optimism among the young than Ted Cruz - because no candidate can better advance freedom for all of America than Ted Cruz. I urge all conservatives to get behind Ted now. **Don 't wait.** We need to be unified for as long as possible before the primaries if we are to beat the Establishment. Let's win with Ted!_
Within the Cruz campaign, we are witnessing a coalescing of courageous conservatives all across the nation from Christians to Libertarians, from farmers to educators, and from those who are concerned about national security and the economy. We're building a broad coalition across America to compete and win, and [**we 'd love for you to be a part of it**](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLy09v5edMMZm9mVbjZI6SnjyOv9tCNeQ-2Bh3O7jH5qpHcq_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCGqVOw1fmCM42S2dIdhhZru3FOtG8Cywk2u9OJ50SxD3od-2Bc4cYm7dGhqcdiQOtwkAlr-2BlKFa9i8jh6-2Begx68M1a3s7Psdrd9OVUiJ1W6ozNCjZQj9kO5qffFFcdHOE2QURW158QbzKHHKowtrqTrXfLmzGKk6YGHeM-2Brb1tDcwwSzL2o1In5GVwCTzxZeT9Q4D3SoZOcmTYTKQIZ0gZJfcnlihbFi1a2-2BPBWL0dJx7b2ZzbzB0suczGQrEa1cG-2F5ZlgAqhBOdQ46BFtxjuspQjZP-2FJ-2Fw0o-2FhKhr8aPdmMKfJYhnJbHryfExbdCi1ApWmq2O5mUksphDvom2tRY07Ty94I6F4WSLsSI-2BeKZBgviL4vD5QrVHLlpqRLjhUsc4hg-3D).

name: Rand Paul
subject: D.C. is broken. This proves it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative,

I'm not sure there's anything that better
proves just how broken Washington, D.C. is today than the scandal
surrounding Planned Parenthood.

Just a few weeks ago, our nation was shocked
to learn that Planned Parenthood abortionists are routinely
aborting babies, dismembering them, and selling off their parts

subject: People are watching
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
A lot of people are watching our race, Friend.

Our opponents have seen the overwhelming support Katie has received since launching her campaign, and they're running scared.

**Club for Growth, the extreme GOP fundraising powerhouse where Pat Toomey used to serve as president, has named Pennsylvania as one of their top targets for 2016.** They're willing to spend whatever it takes to keep this Senate seat in Republican hands.

Hitting our first month goal is even more important than we'd thought. In the weeks since announcing her candidacy, 550 people have stepped up to donate to Katie's race -- but we're still short of where we need to be.

[**This is all hands on deck -- Katie needs you now. Contribute $5 now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3221355665343643648/-7082735047760936960?refcode=20150830e&amount=15)

**Imagine this: Katie wins this election and the Democrats take back the majority in the Senate.** Pennsylvania would have its first-ever woman Senator, and we'd have a champion for good jobs, equal rights, and our environment.

With your help, we'll make that happen. We can't afford to fall short, because Pennsylvania can't handle another 6 years of Pat Toomey.

[**Chip in now to help Katie meet her first month goal.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3221355665343643648/-7082735047760936960?refcode=20150830e&amount=15)

Thanks,

Team Katie

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

I hope you saw the team's email from this morning. We're counting on your support--that's the only way we will win this race.

Marylanders need a senator who has a strong record of getting things done, and who will stand up for our values when we need it most.

When Tea Party extremists threaten to block any progress on addressing the biggest challenges we face, you can count on Chris to fight for real solutions. That's exactly what he has done in the House, and that's exactly what he will do as your next senator. But we need your help to get there.

**We only need 650 more donations before midnight tomorrow to reach our goal. Can we count on you to be one of them?**

**[Please, click here and give what you can to help Chris win.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f3f/70cdc2ba/47a2ca94/395a89a/3659817265/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?refcode=em83015nd2&amount=5.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+therersquos+less+than+48+hours+until+the&utm_campaign=em83015nd1&source=em83015nd1")**
